issues.sample: ON DECEMBER 6, 2016 MY SUNROOF EXPLODED WHILE DRIVING DOWN THE FREEWAY.  THE EXPLOSION WAS SO LOUD AND VIOLENT I THOUGHT I WAS SHOT.  SHARDS OF GLASS RAINED DOWN ON MY HEAD.  I WAS ABLE TO AVOID A VEHICLE COLLISION, BUT WAS VERY SHAKEN UP ABOUT THE ORDEAL.  MY RIGHT EAR FELT DEAF

narrative.headline: What 2016 Kia Cadenza owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 14 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Visibility (43% of reports).
